sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ سُهَيْلَةُ إِنَّ الجَوَّ حَارٌّ جِدًّا اليَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Suhaila je rekla da je danas veoma vruće.
sentences.translationEn: Suhaila said that the weather is very hot today.

sentences.arabic: وَافَقَهَا صَدِيقُهَا وَقَالَ إِنَّهُ يُفَضِّلُ البَرْدَ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj se složio i rekao da preferira hladnoću.
sentences.translationEn: Her friend agreed and said he prefers cold weather.

sentences.translation: Razgovarali su o četiri godišnja doba.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about the four seasons.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَا أَنَّ الرَّبِيعَ هُوَ الفَصْلُ الأَجْمَلُ.
sentences.translation: Zaključili su da je proljeće najljepše godišnje doba.
sentences.translationEn: They decided that spring is the most beautiful season.
